meta_description: Personal website of Anton Lechuga - science, running, music, and references.
study_focus: My current academic interests are centered around
work_text: This website is part of trying to see if and how LLMs can effectively be used to write code without extensive refactoring and debugging.
life_text: In my free time, I spend a lot of time listening to and mixing music, and running longer distances. I use this page to keep track of the things I care about.
quote_text: Normal science, the activity in which most scientists inevitably spend almost all their time, is predicated on the assumption that the scientific community knows what the world is like.
running_text: I enjoy running because it allows me to be outside all by myself. Currently, while also pursuing personal bests, I am concentrating on getting to 100km weekly mileage.
music_text: Music is one of the greatest joys and inspirations in life. I am an amateur DJ and currently trying to get into music production with synthesisers, a mic and some flutes.
music_artist_king_gizzard: King Gizzard and the Lizard Wizard
friend_kristian_text: Anton is the single best thing ever happened to my life!
friend_tilman_text: Some people have study groups. I had Anton.
friend_anton_text: I would recommend everyone to work with or talk to him!
